member.name: F:Etch.ClipBlendGradient.GradientInterpolationSpace.LinearLight
member.summary: Linear-light interpolation (default). Colors are converted to linear space before interpolating, then converted back to the output space. Produces perceptually correct gradients especially for bright colors and long gradients.

member.name: F:Etch.ClipBlendGradient.GradientInterpolationSpace.Srgb
member.summary: sRGB interpolation. Matches legacy CSS 3 behaviour — colors are interpolated directly in sRGB space without linearization.
member.remarks: WARNING: sRGB interpolation produces muddy midtones in red-to-green and similar gradients where both channels are changing significantly. Prefer LinearLight for new work. This option is provided only for legacy authoring compatibility.
